# Microsoft Copilot Studio Release Notes

Microsoft Copilot Studio is a tool for creating and maintaining copilots.

Releases happen frequently and this list is updated throughout the month as features reach worldwide availability.

## Release timelines

Worldwide availability releases:
| Month |
| --- |
| September - 2024 |
| August - 2024 |

Note: The released versions page shows limited recent entries. Detailed release notes are available per-month.

Updated: 2026-04-01
